caption: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a black blazer over a white shirt, stands in a room giving a presentation. She holds a tablet in her hands and gestures as she speaks. Behind her is a large projection screen displaying two side-by-side screenshots of a notes application. The left screen contains the text "Notes", "I love writing notes", "Today", "8 Jun 19:02", and "I love writing notes". The right screen shows "Notes", "11 June 2013 08:33", and "I love writing notes". The word "skeuomorphism" is written across the bottom of the projection. A person wearing a green beanie and a tan shirt is seen from behind, watching the presentation. To the right, a black chair is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to gesture with her hands and eventually points her finger toward the projection screen.
